Frequently Asked Questions

What is OpenClaw?

OpenClaw is an open platform for building AI agents that can use tools, access APIs, and automate workflows. It's more flexible than no-code tools and more accessible than building from scratch.

How long does it take?

Most projects take 2-4 weeks from kickoff to launch. Simple single-agent setups can be faster, while complex multi-agent systems may take longer.

Do I need technical skills?

No. We handle all the technical work. You just need to understand your workflows and be available for feedback during the build process.

What if it doesn't work?

We include 30 days of support after launch to fix any issues. Our process includes thorough testing to catch problems before they affect your business.

How much does ongoing management cost?

Optional management packages start at $1,500/month. This includes monitoring, updates, optimization, and support. Most clients can self-manage after training.
